title: Oreosolen alaicus

The health benefits of Oreosolen alaicus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. taxonomy: Oreosolen alaicus is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as the valerian family. It is a member of the order Dipsacales and the order Dipsacales is part of the larger clade Asterids. The family Valerianaceae is one of the 13 families in the order Dipsacales.
